epistemicStatus: MEASURED (mechanical counts) over a STIPULATED selection rule; exploratory S0 pilot, no feasibility conclusion
selectionRule: top-N WordNet 3.1 synsets by summed SemCor tag_cnt from source index.sense; ties (tag_cnt, then URN ASC); pure function of pinned source + N
selectionBias: SemCor-derived frequency: over-represents 1990s balanced-corpus common vocabulary; under-represents technical/tail senses. Disclosed, not corrected.
